sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_blob_data (id INTEGER, data BLOB);
INSERT INTO test_blob_data (id, data) VALUES (1, 'Hello World'::blob);
INSERT INTO test_blob_data (id, data) VALUES (2, 'DuckDB Database'::blob);
SELECT id, to_base64(data) AS encoded_data FROM test_blob_data;
UPDATE test_blob_data SET data = 'Test Update'::blob WHERE id = 1;
